boundary.model_role: none; no model loading or training in this release
boundary.parser_role: extract bounded relation-shaped premises and candidate claim

claim: v2.4 adds bounded natural-language claim ingestion: simple NL prompts are normalized into candidate graph claims, then verified by the existing typed candidate bridge.
known_limitations: Bounded parser only; no claim of general natural-language understanding.
Single-token or underscore/hyphen concept names are the supported surface.
The parser extracts candidate data only; proof authority remains with typed channels.
scope: Bounded syllogistic and relation-shaped natural language only; not general NLP or broad language understanding.
